sentences.text_original: 下个星期有假期，你打算去哪儿？
sentences.pinyin: Xià ge xīng qī yǒu jià qī, nǐ dǎ suàn qù nǎr?
sentences.text_translation: Keyingi hafta ta'til bor, qayerga bormoqchisan?
sentences.text_translation_ru: На следующей неделе каникулы, куда ты собираешься?
sentences.text_translation_en: There's a holiday next week — where are you planning to go?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Wǒ dǎ suàn qù hǎi biān. Nǐ ne?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я собираюсь на море. А ты?
sentences.text_translation_en: I'm planning to go to the seaside. And you?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我想去山上。我喜欢大自然。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xiǎng qù shān shang. Wǒ xǐ huan dà zì rán.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я хочу в горы. Я люблю природу.
sentences.text_translation_en: I want to go to the mountains. I love nature.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_translation_en: Is it cold in the mountains?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Bù lěng. Dàn shì wǎn shang yǒu diǎn liáng.
sentences.text_translation: Sovuq emas. Lekin kechqurun biroz salqin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Не холодно. Но вечером немного прохладно.
sentences.text_translation_en: Not cold. But it's a bit chilly in the evening.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yí ge rén qù ma?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.pinyin: Bú shì. Wǒ hé jiā rén yì qǐ qù.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нет. Я еду вместе с семьёй.
sentences.text_translation_en: No. I'm going with my family.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我们开车去。开车很方便。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ men kāi chē qù. Kāi chē hěn fāng biàn.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Едем на машине. На машине очень удобно.
sentences.text_translation_en: We're driving. Driving is very convenient.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.pinyin: Zhù de dì fang zhǎo dào le ma?
sentences.text_translation_en: Have you found a place to stay?
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 找到了。我们住在一家小旅馆。
sentences.pinyin: Zhǎo dào le. Wǒ men zhù zài yì jiā xiǎo lǚ guǎn.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Нашли. Мы остановимся в небольшой гостинице.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yes. We're staying at a small inn.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 很漂亮。可以看山，也可以看水。
sentences.pinyin: Hěn piào liang. Kě yǐ kàn shān, yě kě yǐ kàn shuǐ.
sentences.text_translation: Juda chiroyli. Tog'ni ham, suvni ham ko'rsa bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Очень красиво. Можно любоваться и горами, и водой.
sentences.text_translation_en: Very beautiful. You can see mountains and water.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 听起来真好！祝你们玩得开心！
sentences.pinyin: Tīng qǐ lái zhēn hǎo! Zhù nǐ men wán de kāi xīn!
sentences.text_translation: Juda zo'rga o'xshaydi! Yaxshi dam olishlaringizni tilayman!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Звучит здорово! Желаю вам хорошо повеселиться!
sentences.text_translation_en: That sounds great! Have a wonderful time!
sentences.speaker: B
